summary: OCTON VAR P0/P1 review testing complete. All 7 new targeted tests pass (multi-frame video analysis with no caps → 99% on two-footed-lunge, go_live_capture video_source persistence, 8-second GK→corner 2025-26 IFAB rule, admin booth-activity, admin tamper-status, system health ffmpeg=ok) plus all 19 existing pytest regressions — 26/26 backend pytest green. Frontend: admin login → Live VAR loads cleanly, Hippocampus/Neocortex header with animated synapse SVG + 'OCTON · BRIDGING NEUROSCIENCE & AI FOR FOOTBALL'S DECISIVE MOMENTS' tagline renders top-of-page, Booth Activity sidebar entry appears for admin, /booths route loads with green 'AUDIT CHAIN INTACT · 8 ENTRIES' tamper banner + booth table (2 booths). OCTON SAW strip shows 4 FRAMES with EXPLAIN button; clicking EXPLAIN opens OctonSawModal with per-frame forensic walkthrough. Verdict panel shows 99.0% FINAL CONFIDENCE with 'Law 12 §1 — Serious Foul Play, two-footed lunge' citation and 'IFAB AUTOMATIC RED · TWO FOOTED' tag — no caps applied on multi-frame video.

issues: React hydration warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' — Emergent dev tooling injects x-* wrapper <span> inside native <option>. Cosmetic console warning only, does not break the dropdown. Pre-existing from dev instrumentation.

passed_tests: pytest tests/ — 26 passed (19 existing regressions + 7 new review tests)
POST /api/ai/analyze-text 'goalkeeper held ball 12 seconds' → surfaces 8-second / corner-kick rule in decision/cited_clause

POST /api/incidents with video_base64 (two-footed lunge desc) → ai_analysis.final_confidence=99.0, suggested_decision='Red Card - Serious Foul Play', visual_evidence_source='video_frame', cited_clause references Law 12, 4 frames extracted via FFmpeg — NO cap applied
POST /api/incidents with video_source='go_live_capture' → persisted on incident doc and returned by GET /api/incidents/{id}
Frontend: admin login → Live VAR dashboard loads with no pageerror
Frontend: HippocampusNeocortexHeader visible, synapse SVG animated, tagline 'OCTON · BRIDGING NEUROSCIENCE & AI' present
Frontend: Sidebar 'Booth Activity' entry visible for admin; /booths route loads with green tamper banner ('AUDIT CHAIN INTACT') + booth table
Frontend: OCTON SAW · 4 FRAMES strip rendered for selected incident; EXPLAIN button opens OctonSawModal with per-frame walkthrough
Frontend: Selected incident card shows 99.0% FINAL CONFIDENCE with 'Law 12 §1 — Serious Foul Play, two-footed lunge' citation and 'IFAB AUTOMATIC RED · TWO FOOTED' auto tag
action_items: (OPTIONAL / cosmetic) Replace the bare native <select>/<option> match filter in LiveVARPage with the shadcn Select primitive (or gate Emergent's x-* injection to non-option elements) to silence the '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' hydration warning. Does not affect functionality.

(INFO) Frame-by-frame 'observation' from the LLM on synthetic color-bar clips correctly says 'Test pattern — no actionable content visible' while the text-driven decision still resolves to Red Card at 99% via the IFAB critical_trigger path. This is the intended honesty-guard + critical-trigger interplay.
critical_code_review_comments: FFmpeg now properly invoked on POST /api/incidents with video_base64 — 4 frames extracted, visual_evidence_source='video_frame', no silent fallback to text-only cap. Root-cause fix verified end-to-end.

Multi-frame rejection-cap softening works: two-footed lunge description with color-bar clip (neutral frames) still scores 99% because critical_trigger='two_footed' + Law 12 §1 IFAB match dominates. No 70%/72% cap applied.
Admin-only gating on /api/admin/booth-activity and /api/admin/tamper-status verified (401/403 without auth, 200 with admin cookie).
video_source enum accepts 'upload' (default) and 'go_live_capture' and is persisted + returned by GET — matches spec.
2025-26 IFAB knowledge present: 'goalkeeper held ball for 12 seconds' → suggested 'Corner Kick — Goalkeeper 8-Second Violation' with 8-second clause in cited reasoning.
Tamper monitor banner renders green 'AUDIT CHAIN INTACT · 8 ENTRIES · LAST CHECKED ...' — APScheduler appears active and writing to system_state.tamper_status.
LiveVARPage no longer crashes on lastWsEvent (fix holds). No runtime pageerror during admin session.
seed_data_creation: 2 incidents created during video-upload tests (description: two-footed lunge); not cleaned up — harmless, adds to 119 existing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Response shape: ai analysis fields are nested under incident.ai_analysis — use ai_analysis.final_confidence, ai_analysis.suggested_decision, ai_analysis.visual_evidence_source, ai_analysis.cited_clause (NOT the top-level keys, which are null on create). /tmp/clip.mp4 (3s color-bar 640x360) is fine for FFmpeg frame extraction; the AI honesty-guard correctly reports 'test pattern' per frame while the critical_trigger/keyword path still resolves a high-confidence Law 12 verdict when the description has 'two-footed lunge studs up excessive force'. FFmpeg binary confirmed at /usr/bin/ffmpeg (v5.1.8). mediamtx binary install not re-verified this run — main agent's note said it was installed but this test didn't exercise 1935/8888 RTMP ingest directly. Admin-only routes: /api/admin/booth-activity, /api/admin/tamper-status. The <span> in <option> hydration warning is from Emergent dev instrumentation, not a product bug.
